label - Variable in class com.example.junimoapp.admin.AdminImageAdapter.ImageItem
 
LanguageHelper - Class in com.example.junimoapp.utils
 
LanguageHelper() - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.utils.LanguageHelper
 
leaveEventWaitList(Event) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.models.User
Removes user from the events waitlist Updates Firestore to remove the event from the users waitlistedEvents, and local list
listOfEvents() - Static method in class com.example.junimoapp.Organizer.EventData
returns list of all the events
ListOfMyEvents - Class in com.example.junimoapp.Organizer
Views list of the organizers events Shows: - event title - description, - an edit button to edit the event, - and a QR code button to view the qrcode associated with the event Buttons functions: - edit buttons opens CreateEvent screen - QR code button opens a qrcode pop up screen
ListOfMyEvents(List<Event>) - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.Organizer.ListOfMyEvents
constructor
ListOfMyEvents.EventViewHolder - Class in com.example.junimoapp.Organizer
holds the view of each event item shows event title, description and an edit button to edit the event
